title: thelypteris marginalis f. elegans
intro: Thelypteris marginalis f. elegans, also known as the elegant maidenhair fern or maiden's hair fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions in Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris marginalis f. elegans include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
